choices.title: Ahh, thank you for setting me free.

choice.title: What, I didn't set you free.
choice.response: You certainly did, just like I planned.

choice.title: What do you mean?
choice.response: Well, I was bound to the daemon realm until...

choice.title: Until what?
choice.response: An exceptional person sacrifices themself for me...

choice.title: Uhuh?
choice.response: And you made that happen by being a hero.

choice.title: I don't understand, you planned this?
choice.response: Yes, Indeed I did. Let me explain.

choice.title: Go ahead.
choice.response: Some time ago I became aware of Shaydana and...

choice.title: And?
choice.response: Her infinite desire for knowledge and power.

choice.title: Go on.
choice.response: I promised to give her that in exchange for...

choice.title: Some hot action between the sheets?
choice.response: Hah, you have a dirty mind but not that.

choice.title: What then?
choice.response: Some poor girls that nobody cares about.

choice.title: What do you need poor girls for?
choice.response: Well, there's never too many big mouths.

choice.title: Wait what, you turn them into daemons?
choice.response: Yes, they go straight into the slag pits...

choice.title: Uhh?
choice.response: And they're morphed into big mouths.

choice.title: Wow.
choice.response: It also saves some training time.

choice.title: Why's that?
choice.response: Because they were already quite capable...

choice.title: To do what?
choice.response: To put things in their mouths, haha.

choice.title: So, how do I fit in this plan of yours?
choice.response: Well, Shaydana was many things but...

choice.title: But?
choice.response: Suicidal was not one of them.

choice.title: I still don't get it.
choice.response: My plan contained three steps...

choice.title: And those are?
choice.response: Desire, guilt and a hero.

choice.title: Oh, I see.
choice.response: Yes, desire can lead to guilt and...

choice.title: And?
choice.response: When I say nobody cares I mean...

choice.title: Only heroes care.
choice.response: Yes, you understand me now.

choice.title: I pushed her over the edge.
choice.response: Yes, and now I'm free to destroy your world.

choice.title: There's a minor flaw in your plan.
choice.response: And what is that?

choice.title: I happen to be a superhero!
choice.response: Haha, we'll see about that.
